title.zh: 1.6 升 V6 涡轮混合动力时代

summary.zh: 2014 年起，F1 引擎规则全面转向 1.6 升涡轮增压 V6 混合动力单元，能量回收系统大幅提升热效率；梅赛德斯凭借这套动力单元的先发优势开启了长期统治。
summary.en: From 2014, F1's engine rules switched entirely to 1.6-litre turbocharged V6 hybrid power units with energy-recovery systems that sharply raised thermal efficiency; Mercedes' early lead in this technology launched a long spell of dominance.
